ch0348_00_raifort/0101_0701_01_10:
Greetings, [Name:PlayerNickname ].
Whatever you did since our last encounter
is now a part of history.
ch0348_00_raifort/0101_0701_02_10:
Today is yet another day for me to speak of
history’s marvels.
ch0348_00_raifort/7101_0701_01_10: History is a wonderful thing. Truly splendid.
ch0348_00_raifort/7101_0701_02_10:
The lives of our ancestors throughout history
forged the path to the present in which we
live!
ch0348_00_raifort/7101_0701_03_10:
Imagining the times of old gives me bliss like
no other!
ch0348_00_raifort/7102_0701_01_10:
Although my curriculum mainly covers the
history of Paldea...
ch0348_00_raifort/7102_0701_02_10:
my fascination for history applies to all
regions!
ch0348_00_raifort/7102_0701_03_10:
All the histories of this world are delicious
confections for my curiosity!
ch0348_00_raifort/7103_0701_01_10:
I heard Pasio is an artificial island, but
personally, I find no joy in twisted nature
with no weight of history behind it.
ch0348_00_raifort/7103_0701_02_10:
I admit the technology to construct an
environment such as this is impressive,
but that’s it—nothing more, nothing less.
ch0348_00_raifort/7103_0701_03_10:
Still, even this artificial structure may bear
historical value after many years.
ch0348_00_raifort/7104_0701_01_10: Like history, people deepen as time passes.
ch0348_00_raifort/7104_0701_02_10:
My interest is certainly piqued by thoughts
that have been given time to age.
ch0348_00_raifort/7104_0701_03_10:
The older the person or history, the more
they’re worth investigating. You think that
too, I take it?
ch0348_00_raifort/7105_0701_01_10:
[Name:PlayerNickname ]. You may
indeed be of good use to me someday...
ch0348_00_raifort/7105_0701_02_10:
Ah, you can disregard that. I was simply
thinking out loud.
ch0348_00_raifort/7105_0701_03_10:
I trust you will continue to provide
good results.
ch0348_00_raifort/1701_0701_01_10:
Here. Allow me to give you something
useful.
ch0348_00_raifort/1701_0702_01_10: Think of it as a favor from me. Heh heh...
ch0348_00_raifort/2501_0701_01_10:
Apparently, the prince of some country is in
charge of this island.
ch0348_00_raifort/2501_0701_02_10:
From what I’ve heard, it is a country with an
extensive history.
ch0348_00_raifort/2501_0702_01_10:
Just between you and me...don’t you want
a look at the treasures and books in Prince
Lear’s residence?
ch0348_00_raifort/2501_0702_02_10:
I have heard part of the collection isn’t open
to the public. If only there were a way to
lay my eyes on it.
ch0348_00_raifort/2501_0702_03_10:
It caught your interest too, right? If you have
any ideas, I’m all ears.
ch0348_00_raifort/2511_0701_01_10:
My investigations have taken me into many
ruins and caves. Perhaps that explains this
affliction of mine.
ch0348_00_raifort/2511_0701_02_10:
According to one expert, I seem to have
been cursed by a vengeful spirit.
ch0348_00_raifort/2511_0701_03_10: Talk about an occupational hazard. Hahaha!
ch0348_00_raifort/2511_0702_01_10:
You cannot unravel the truth about history
without facing danger.
ch0348_00_raifort/2511_0702_02_10:
As long as I can quench my thirst for
knowledge, I’ll bear any hex, no matter
what it does to me!
ch0348_00_raifort/3001_0701_01_10:
Good morning. Whatever you did yesterday,
it is now a part of history.
ch0348_00_raifort/3003_0701_01_10:
There never is enough time. I’m sure you
understand, with how relentlessly you pursue
knowledge.
ch0348_00_raifort/3005_0701_01_10:
Oho, is that the time already? I must’ve
gotten swept up in what I was doing...
